Fresnillo (FNLPF/FRES.L)

Primarily explores for silver, gold, lead, and zinc concentrates. Based in Mexico

  • Flagship project is Fresnillo silver mine located in the state of Zacatecas
  • Profit up 56% 1h19->1h20
  • Free cash flow of US$242.6m in 1H20 (-US$80.7m in 1H19).
  • Silver cost is 7.31/oz
  • JUANICIPIO is coming mid-21
  • 514M in cash
  • Resources: 2.3 BNOZ silver, 39 MOZ gold
  • Produciton 1H20: 26.8 moz silver (-2.7%), 381 koz gold (-11.8%)
  • Construction of the pyrites plant (phase II) at Fresnillo continued, commissioning expected in 2H20
